completed_tasks.name: Connes 2026 paper analyzed — proves simple+even => critical line

context_notes: BREAKTHROUGH: Connes 2026 (arXiv:2602.04022) proves: simple+even eps_0 => zeros on critical line. Our numerics verify simple+even to lam^2=5000. This closes Gap 2. Now only TWO gaps remain: (1) rank bound from Slepian theory, (3) eps_0->0 rate. The paper should highlight this connection.
next_action: Update paper draft to incorporate the Connes 2026 theorem connection. Then read Connes 2020 (arXiv:2006.13771) for the prolate rank proof. If that closes Gap 1, only Gap 3 (eps_0->0 rate) remains.
